chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 104 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For katcha Peshi 3. For hearing of MA No 452/2018 15.02.2018. Mr. Karim Bukhsh Rind Advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt:A.G -=-=- Learned counsel for the petitioner under the instructions of petitioner does not press this constitutional petition which is disposed of as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed/steno
